pericopes.title: Thilsem pumpi chunga Pakaiyin chamna lengvai apoh (Is.2:1-4)

chapters.text: Judah gam lengte Jotham khanglai le Ahaz khanglai, chule Hezeki’ah khanglaiya Mo’resheth khoa mi Micah kitipan themgao thilmua Samar’ia le Jerusalem khopi chung chang thudola thil amua, ahenga Pakaiyin thu anasei chu:

Ngaiyuvin nabonchauvin nang ho mitin vaipi jousen, Vo leiset le asunga chengten ngaisoh keiyun; Pakai ahouin thenga konin hung kondoh hen, Hiche Pakai Pathen hi nangho dou nan hettohsah-in pang jeng hen.
Ijeh-inem itileh vetan, Pakai chu aumna muna konin ahung potdoh-in, Hung kumlha a leiset chunga Munsang lai jouse akengtoa achotpha cheh ding ahi.
Akengto noiya molsang jouse jolsoh ding, Phaicham jouse jong poh khisoh ding ahi; Meikong masanga khoilu jollha tobang, Kenleng laiya twi kisung lha tobang hiding ahi.

Jacob suh khelna jeh a hijatpi hi soh a, Israel insung chonset jouse jeh a hijat hi soh ding ahi. Jacob suh khelna chu ipi ham? Samar’ia khopi jeh hilou ham? Judah insung chonsetna ipi ham? Jerusalem khopi jeh hilou ham?

Hijeh a chu Samar’ia khopi hi Tol lhanga in-gem jenga kalup sah a Min lengpilei akibolna ding bep a kaumsah ding, Khopi dunga songtum jouse jong phaichama kasunlhah ding ahi: Hitobang tah a chu Khopi khombul jouse kalaidoh ding ahiye.

Khopi sunga milimdoi kisem jouse kivogoi soh hel’a, Alodoh nei le gou aboncha meiyin akahvam ding; Khopi sunga milimdoi jouse ahomkeova kajamding, Ajeh chu notiho man a kidong khom ahiuvin, Hitobanga notiho henga Kilepeh soh hel diu ahiye.
Hiche dingjeh a hi keima lunghema kap ding kigo kahin, Kengchot selouva keng keova lamjot go kahi; Keima kamkeite kut bangin kung ting, Va-ngongsang lunghem bangin lunghem inge.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin abolsetna hi amaha amelse behseh tan, Judah gamsung geiyin ahung lhung tai. Hitobanga melse maha hi Kamite kelkot phung Jerusalem ahung geitai.
Gath khopi jah a seipoh hih hel’un, Beth-le-aph’rah a jong kap hih-uvin; Nang ho le nangho natahsauvin Leivui lah a kitangle leuvin.

Shaphir khoa chengte Nachena diu lampia kicheuvin; Jum le ja thoh-in Natahsa goh keovin cheuvin; Za’anan khoa chengte, Hung potdoh dauvin; Beth-e’zel khopi chu abulkhom akibot kangsoh-in, Akidouna abonchan alhongsoh hel tai.
Maroth khoa chengten vang Thilpha hungsoh ding angah lel lheh jengui; Ajeh chu Pakaiya konin thilse ahung leng lhan, Jerusalem khopi kelkot phung ahung geitai.
Lachish khoa chengte, Sakolte chu kangtalai akaina diuvin anamkol bupeh-in; Nang ho hi Zion chanute Chonset kipatna nahiuve; Ajeh chu nangho chunga hin Israel suh khelna jouse akimudoh soh tai.
Hijeh a chu Mo’resheth-gath jong chu Kikhenna ding thilpeh napeh ding ahi; Israel lengte dinga jong Achzib insung pumpi hi Kilhep chatvaina thil’a hung pang diu ahi.
Gal’a nabol’a najou ding khat kahin puilut khum ding ahi, Vo Mare’shah khoa cheng mite; Israel loupina jong chu Adullam chang ding ahitai.
Nasam kivochaisoh keiyun lang umuvin, Kipana na nei nachapate jeh chun; Muthong bang khun lutol del dul’in umuvin, Ajeh chu nachate nahenguva kona sohchanga cheuva ahitai.
Ohe ada ahiuve, thilse ngaito toa Ajalkhun chunguva thilse bol bol ho! Jalkhun chunga agel jouseu khovah teng abolpai jiuve, Ijeh-inem itileh akhut’uva abolna thei tha aneiyu ahi.

Mi louma jouse adeichauvin akilah jeng jiuve, Mi in jouse jong adei chauvin akilah jiuvin ahi; Mihem chu amajong abol gentheiyun ainsung mijong abol gentheiyui, Mihem chu amale anei agou kibangin abolseuve.

Hijeh chun Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: Vetan, hitobang insung mite dinga hi Keiman thilse kaboldoh ding ahi, Hitobang thilsea kona hi nalolchang nabodoh lou diu ahi; Chujongleh kiletsah hoithoa navale lou diu, Ijeh-inem itileh hitobang phat hi Phat phaloutah hi ding ahibouve.

Hiche nikhoa hi mihon Nang ho douna kiletsah la asah diu, Dou thei louhel hel’a kap’uva, “Keiho amangthah hel kahitauve“; Aman kamite chan ding akhelsoh tan, Kakoma kona itijong atoldoh hitam! Gal-hinga eikaiteu chu Aman kalouma jouseu ahoppeh tai,” tia asei diu ahi.
Hijeh a chu Pakai Houbung sunga Koimacha jong vang kisana agol gol’a kitol ding nanei lou ding ahi.
Amaho thusei bang hin ‘Lung hangin thu seidauvin, Min hitobang thil’a lung phamoa thu aseilou ding ahi; Itijongleh vetda nan Eiphah louhel diu ahi,’ ati diu ahi.
Vo Jacob insung, hitobanga hi thu kisei mong ding hiya, Pakai Lhagao chu thoh hatlouva um mong hitam? Hitobang thil kibol ho hi ama bol hinam? Lungdih tah a lamjot pa dia kaseiho hi phachomlou ham?
Ahinla nangho hi kamite chunga Gal le tol bangin nachungsoh tauve; Mi lung monga um ho jong aponsil naho-lhah peh-uvin, Kiphatlamna bei’ya umpa jong gal nabol khum’uve.
Kamite lah a numeiho geiyin Ain’uva nomtah a achen nauva konin nadel jam’uve; Achateu asenhoa konin jong Kaloupina nalamang soh heltauve.
Kipatdoh-in chetauvin Ajeh chu hikom hi kicholdo mun ahipoi; Manthahna melse tah a misu mang hel thei manna, Hiche thenlouna jeh a chu choldo mun hithei lou ahi.

Mihem khat vah le hen lang ajou keoseh seile hen, ‘“Keiman lengpitwi nadonna thei le khamna thei Nadonna thei ding seipeh lenge,” tin seijongleh, Amajong chu hitobang bep mite dia bou thuhil le hiding ahi.

Vo Jacob, namite aboncha kakhop soh hel ding, Israel mi ahingdoh avaldoh cheng jong kakhop ding ahi; Kelngoite hongsunga kikhol khom bang a Abonchauva hong khat’a kakhol khoma; Hamhing lah a lhakhom kelngoi hon banga Kakhol khoma mihonpi aolah lah a um diu ahi.

Kotpi hongdoh a pangpa chu amasanguva lamkaiya panga, Mihonpin kelkot jeng jong atumkehuva kijotdoh diu; Hiche kelkot’a chu potdoh soh keiyuva, Alengpau jong chu amasanguva lamkaiya Ahivanga abonchauva Alamkai pipen chu Pakai hiding ahi.
Keiman kaseitai: Ngaiyuvin Jacob dinga lamkaiya pang ho, Israel insunga vaihoma pang ho! Nang ho dinga hi Adih lama thutanje het ding hi thil khoh hilou ham?
Nanghon thilpha nahouvin, Thilse joh nadeijouve; Nang ho hin kamite vun nalip doh pehuvin, Aphe jouseu jong agu achanguva konin naleu lhauve.
Kamite tahsa apheu naneuvin, Avun jouseu nalip peh-uvin ahi; Agu achangu naheboh peh uvin, Sa kihon bangin belkonga nakihon’uvin, Khangbel sunga sa kikang bangin Nakikan’uvin ahi.
Chujou tengleh Pakai henga hung tao jongleu Pakaiyin ahou lou diu ahi; Pakaiyin amaho mu dia amai asel mang ding ahi. Ajeh chu athilbol achon nau thilse jeng ahibouve.

Kamite pui chavaiya pang themgao ho, Neh ding akimu niu leh ‘“Lung mon um hen,” tia, Akamsunguva neh ding hetlut peh loupa henga Gal bolkhum jeng dia seiho Hiche themgaoho chung chang thudol’a Pakaiyin hitin aseiye.

Nangho hin themgao thilmu tobang namu lou diu ahin, Jan muthim tobanga naum diu ahi; Kigaona thei beihel’a naum’uva Muthim lhangkhal kiheh lah a um tobang nahi diu ahi. Themgaoho dinga nisa jong lhum mang ding, Achunguva sunlai jeng jong thim ding ahi.
Mitva neipa jong kivetda ding, Gaotheina neipa jong kijumso ding; Pathena kona thu kisei ajah loujeh-uva Amahon jong akamu akisip dingu ahitai.

Kei din vang katha ahat’in lhasam louvin kaum nai, Pakai Lhagao toh kapang khomin, Thanei tah le adih jengin thu katanin, Jacob henga asuh khel seipeh dingleh Israel jah a achonset phonpeh din kaum jinge.
Hiche hi ngaiyuvin Jacob insunga lamkaiho, Israel insung vaihoma pang ho, Thu adih a tan ding deimoa Akitoh a thil bolding nomlou ho;
Zion lhanga thisanto kihal’a in sa sa, Adih lou lamtah a Jerusalem khopi semdoh ho.

Alamkaiya pang hon nehguh muna din thu atan’uvin, Athempua pang hon jong sumlo nan na atongui; Athemgaova pang hon jong sum muna din gaothu aseiyui, Ahivangin Pakaiya ki-ngai bangin aseiyun, “Eiho lah a Pakai cheng jing hilou ham? Imacha thilsen eipha pouvinte,” atiuvin ahi.
Hiti ahijeh hin nangho jeh a Zion lhang jong loulai kai banga kakai ding, Jerusalem khopi jong in-gem jenga kijam ding, Houin molsang jong thingbong thingbai kijamchap ding ahi.

Khonung tengleh hitia hi hung um ding ahi, Pakai houin molsang hi Molsang jouse lah a asangpena kitungdoh ding, Thinglhang jouse chunga kitahdoh ding ahi; Hiche mosanga chu Mitin vaipi hung longkhom diu ahi.

Hichea hi namtin vaipi tamtah hunguva asei diu: “Hunguvin Pakai molsanga kaltouvu hi tin, Jacob Pathen houin geiyin chetouvu hite, Chutileh Pakaiyin adanthu eihil theiyun tin, Chutengleh eiho jeng jong Pakai lampi semsa dunga ichethei diu ahi,” tiu vinte. Ijeh-inem itileh Zion lhanga kona danthu hung sohdoh ding, Jerusalem khopia kona Pakaiyin thu aseidoh ding ahi.

Pakaiyin mitin vaipi tampi kah a thu atan ding, Gamla tah a cheng nam mite thu geiya atan ding ahi; Chutengle mihon achemjam u tucha akikhen’uva, Athengchau jong kangkuiya akikhen diu, Nam khat’in nam khat douna dinga Chemjam alap louhel ding ahi; Mihon gal kisat jong Ahetphah louhel diu ahitai;
Miho chu ama ama lengpigui lim noi, Ama ama theichang phungnoi cheh a kitou thim diu, Koimachan amaho chu ahoh kichat lou ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itileh thaneipen Pakaiyin aseisa ahitai.
Ajeh chu mitin vaipi jong ama ama doihou Pathen ahisah hou min pan’a lamjot cheh ahiuvin, Eiho jong atonsot atonsot geiya Pakai i-Pathenu mina ilamjot diu ahi.
Pakaiyin aseiyin, hiche nikho chuleh Elbai jouse kakhop ding, Min adelmangsa jouse jong Kakhop khom ding ahi; Chujongleh keiman kabolgimsa mite Kakhop khomsoh kei ding ahi;

Elbai ho chu keiman ahingdoh amoh a kasemdoha Paidohsa kikoiho jong chu nam hat tah kaso ding ahi; Amaho cheng chunga hi Zion lhanga kona Pakaiyin achunguva lengvai apoh ding, Tulaiya pat’a atonsot atonsot khang geiya Pakaiyin lengvai apoh jing ding ahi.

Chule nangma, vo kelngoihon dia intinguvuma pang, Zion chanu dinga lhangsang tah a kisong, Nahenga hung lhung kit ding ahi, Masang laiya lengvai neina chu hung lhung ding ahi; Jerusalem chanu lenggam kiti chu Hung lhung kit ding ahiye.
Tua hi ibola nangma othongje jua kap nahim? Nakhosunga chu leng beiya hi tam? Nangma thumop’a pangji chu amangthah hitam? Numei naoso nat’in aphah banga nat nan naphah hi tam?

Vo Zion chanu, numei so’nat bangin Na san lang kipehle le jengin; Ajeh chu tua hi khopia kona napotdoh a Gamlah a nachen ding ahitai; Babylon gama nache ding ahin, Hikoma kona chu nakihuhdoh ding ahiye; Hikoma kona chu Pakaiyin Namelmate khut’a kona nahuhdoh ding ahi.
Tun nangma dou din namtin vaipi tamtah akikhomun, “Zion lhang hi kisuboh hen lang imit’in veuhite,” atiuve.
Ahinla amaho hin Pakai lunggel ahepouvin, Abonchauva hi changphola chil lhah dia Changpal kipukhom banga Pakaiyin akhop khom ahiuve, ti akihetkhen pouve.

Vo Zion chanu, kipatdoh-in chil loiyin, Ajeh chun keiman nasaki chu thih kahisah ding, Nasatin teni jong sum-eng kahisah ding ahi; Nangman mitin vaipi tamtah nachil goiya Aneiyu chang jouse jong khu Pakai henga natodoh ding ahi; Leiset pumpi Pakai henga Aneiyu agou jouseu napeh doh ding ahi.
Tua vang nakimvel’a pal khat kikaiya Naki-umkimsoh a nakikai khumsoh ahitai; Eiho kho hung ki-um ahin, Israel vaihompa chu abengphe mol’in ajep tauve.

Vo Bethlehem Eph’rathah, Nangma Judah phung sunga aneopen nahi; Hijongleh nanga kona hi kei dinga Israel sunga vaihom ding khat hung pengdoh ding, Ama chu akipatna ahung konna gollui laipeh-a ahitan, Ni masa lai lha masa laiya um jingsa peh ahitai.
Pakaiyin amaho hi aso natnun cha ahindoh kahsea Donlouva akoiya adalhah ding ahitai; Chutengleh asopite ahingdoh amoh chengse chu Israel chate henga hung kile kit diu ahi.

Ama chu dinga Pakai thahat vanga Akelngoihon chu avah ding ahin, Pakai a-Pathen min loupia chu Avah ding ahiye. Aman leiset kolmang geiya atha ajedoh ding ahitan, Amaho jong Lung monga cheng den diu ahitai.

Assyria mi agamsung uva hung lut’a I-leiset’u ahinchot lut ding hijongleh Chamna lengtei tei ding ahi, Ajeh chu eihon ama chu idou diu, Kelngoi chinga pang mi sagi leh Mipi lah a milen milal get pang diu ahi.

Amaho hin Assyria gamsung chu chemjama vai ahom’uva, Nimrod gamsunga chemjam asadohuva vai ahom diu ahi; Assyria mi chu igamsung uva ahung lut’ a Igamgiu ahinkal lhah a ileiset’u achotlut teng jong leh Assyria mi khut’a kona hi Amahon eihuhdoh diu ahi.

Chutengleh Jacob mite ahingdoh amoh chengse chu Mitin vaipi lah a um’uva, Pakaiya kona hung phinlha daitwi tobang hi diu, Mihem manchah dia bangman louva um Hampa chunga daitwi phinlha leh Mihem chapate manchah theilouva dai tobang hi diu ahi.

Chutengleh Jacob mite ahingdoh amoh chengse chu Namtin vaipi lah a um’uva, Mitin vaipi jalah a kithe cheh soh diu, Gammang lah a gamsa ho lah a sakei bahkai tobanga um’uva, Kelngoihon lah-a sakei bahkai nou tobanga um diu, kelngoi chu ahung potdoh tih tih Achot lhuh a abotel jenga Koimacha ahuhdoh ding beihela alha tobanga um diu ahi.
Nakidoupi chunga nakhut kidom sang jing ding, Namelmate abonchauva kisat lhauva kithat gam ding ahiuve.
Pakaiyin aseiyin, hiche nikho chuleh Nakoma kona nasakolte kathagam ding, Nakangtalai jouse jong Kasuhset soh hel ding ahi;
Nagamsunga khopi jouse jong kasuh manga, Nakulpi jouse jong abonchan kaphet lhah ding ahi;
Nakhut’a natundoh phunsan them jouse kasuh manga, Themka khatcha jong nanei louhel ding ahitai;
Milimdoi nasem jouse kasuh manga, Nakoma kona nadoikhom jouse kasuh bei ding, Chutengleh nangin jong nakhut’a nasemsa thil ho Nahouva akoma naboh khup kit louhel ding ahitai.
Nakoma kona Ashe’rim doi nahou ho jong Abul abal geiya kakaldoh soh hel ding, Nakhopi jouse jong aboncha Kasuh mangsoh hel ding ahi.
Lung hangtah le lungsa mong monga Keiman phu kalah ding ahin, Thu ngailou namtin vaipi chunga Phu kalah ding ahiye.
Pakai thusei hi ipi ham ngaiyuvin: Kipatdoh-in lang nachung chang thu hi Molsang jouse maiya seidoh temin. Chutengleh nathusei ogin chu Thinglhang gamsung jouse ngaisah temin.

Ngaiyuvin nangho molsang jouse, Pakaiyin mi anelna thu kisei ho hi; Aitih chan geiya doujou jinga pang Leiset bulpi khom jousen jong ngaiyuvin. Ajeh chu Pakaiyin amite toh kinelna khat aneiyin, Israel toh kina lhon ding ahi.
“Vo kamite, nang dia ipi kabolpeh hitam? Ipipena nangma kalung gimsah ham? Neidonbut temin!
Chuti sangin keiman Egypt gama konin kahin puidoh-in, Kihenna in bulputna ina konin kalhatdoh- in, Nalamkai dingin Mose le Aaron chule Miriam kasol pehjoi.

Vo kamite, Moab lengpa Balak chun thilse Itobanga anagon hiya, Be’or chapa Balaam chun itobanga adonbut ham, geldoh tem’uvin. Pakai mihuhhingna nahet theina diuva na atoh ho, Shittim a pat Gilgal geiya ipi pi soh am?” ati.
“Ipi thilpeh choiya Pakai angsunga kalut’a, Chung Pathen angsunga kaboh khup ding ham? Pathen angsunga chu kum khat lhingsa cheh Bongnou jeng pumgo thilto dia kachoilut ding ham?

Pakai chu kelngoi chal jeng asang sang kipe leh Lung lhai mong ding hiya, Vadung sangsom jen dimset thaotwi kipeleh Lung lhai mong ding hinam? Kasuh khelna ngaidamna dia Kacha apeng masapen kapeh ding hiya, Kahinkhoa kachonset jeh a Katahsaa pengdoh masa kacha chu kapeh ding hi tam?” ati.
Vo mihem, Pakaiyin thilpha chu navetsahsa ahitai, Pakaiyin nanga kona adei chu ipi ham? Thu adih a natanpeh a mi khoto ding nakhohsah a, Na-Pathen nunga kinemsah tah a lam najot ding hi ahibouve.
Pakai ogin chu khopi sunga akithongin, Nangma min gin jing ding hi chihna giltah ahi; “Ngaiyuvin, khopi sunga kikhom Khoppi leh phungin!
Migilou insunga kikhol gitlona chu Keiman kasuh mil thei mong ding hiya, Gaosap changsa thil adih louva kite chu Kasuh mil thei beh ding ham?
Thiltena adih louva thiltea panga Hitobang alhing louva thiltena kipoh le Sakhao lentah tah a vahle ho chu Keiman them kachan thei ding hinam?
Namite mihaohon jong pumhat jeng athouvin, Nagamsunga chengten jong jouthu jeng aseiyui; Akamsunguva aleiguiyu jong hi Jouthu sei nan akilehpel jenge.
Hijeh a chu kenjong nang kaden pan ahitan, Nachonset chengse jeh a ahomkeova kajam nahitai.

Nangin an naneh ding ahinan Va vang nava louhel ding; Na-oisunga nagil keljing jeng ding, Thil kikholdoh doh nan natin, Imacha nakoidoh thei louhel ding, Nangin nakholdohsa chu keiman chemjamto katoa kalahdoh ding ahibouve.

Muchi natu tu jeng ding, Aga nalo louhel ding ahi; Olive thao naheh heh jeng ding ahin, Nangma la thaotwi nakinu lou ding ahi; Lengpiga jong nachil chil jeng ding, Ahivanga lengpitwi nadonkhah loubel ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh nangman Omri kitipa dan semsa najuiyin, Ahab insung mite natoh jouse namang jinge; Amahon nathumop bang bangin nachen nachon jin, Keiman nakeova kajamlona ding min naphiset khumna din naumdoh tai; Hijeh a hi nangman Mitin vaipin nahouset najah ding ahitai,” ati.
Ohe ada kahitai! Ajeh chu nipi laiya thingga kiloukhom tobang leh Theichangga kichomna nungsang Tobangin kaumdoh tai; Neh theidol theiboh la aumpon, Kaduchat geo theichangga amin masa jong aumpoi.

Leiset chunga Pathen gingte la amangthah tan, Mihemte lah a lungdih pua khatcha jong aumpoi; Abonchauvin thisan so ding jeng agel’un achang panguvin, Amitakip hin asopi kipalna ding thang akam kam jengui.

Akhut’uvin thilse jeng abol’uvin, Lung nachang mongin thilse chu abol’uve; Milen milalte thutana pangin jong Nehguh ding akithum thum’uvin ahi; Mi loupi pin jong alunga aduchat thilse chu aphongdoh jengin, Hitobang hin abonchan akihel lhop soh hel’uve.

Alah-uva aphapena kisei jong chu ling tobang ahin, Lungdih pentah a kiseipa jong nangtom lah bep ahi. Min avet lhih na diu nikho, Talen amatna diu nikho chu ahung lhung tai; Tun vang alung don’uva akisuh lung gimna diu anaitai.
Naheng nakom chunga ki-ngaidan lang, Nagol napai chunga kinep dan; Nakam kihup thim beh-in lang, Naki-angkoipi numei jah a imacha seidoh dan.
Ijeh-inem itileh chapan jong apa aphinse sen, Chanu jong anu dou din akipan tai; Mounu jong atehpi chunga akhangsen, Mihem khat kidoupi melma kitiho chu ainsung mijeng ahitauve.
Kenvang Pakai vejing ing ting, Eihuhhing ka-Pathen ka-ngajing ding ahi; Chutileh ka-Pathenin Kataona angai tei ding ahi.
Vo kamelma, kachunga kipah thanom hih-in, Keima lhujong leng kadindoh kit ding ahi; Muthim lah a tou jong leng Pakai chu kei dia khovah a pang ding ahi.

Pakaiyin eihousetna chu keiman kangai tei ding ahi, Ajeh chu ama dounan keima kachonsetai; Aman kachung chang thu eiseipeh a Kei dia thu atan masangsea ka-ngai ngai ding ahi. Pakaiyin khovah laiya eipuidoh-in tin, Amihuhhingna chu keiman kamu ding ahi.

Chutengleh kamelman amudoh ding, Kajah a, “Pakai na-Pa then chu hoiya umba hi tam?” tia Eidongnu chu kijumsoa jahcha behseh jeng ding ahi. Hichenu chu kamit te nia noise tah a kavet ding, Ama chu lamlen lai kholai dunga Min achot lhuh a Leivui chil banga kichil thang ding ahi.
Napal jouse nakai phatna ding nikho ahung lhunge; Hiche nikho chuleh gamgi lentah a kikeh len ding ahi.

Hiche nikho hileh nahenga mi hunga, Assyria gama pat Egypt gam chan gei, Egypt gama pat’a Luipi dung geiya jong, Twikhanglena pat Twikhanglen gei, Molsang jousea kona Lhang sang jouse geiya hung ding ahi.
Leiset vang hi asunga cheng mite tohkhel jeh a, Kidalha soh hel’a ahomkeova kijam ding ahitai.

Natenggol kipat’in lang namite hi Kelngoi chin bangin chingin; Nagoulo nakelngoi honte hi, Honlei lai gammang lah a hin achangseh-in achenge; Amaho hi Bashan gam le Gilead gama Kelngoi lhat bangin lhau hen, gollui laiya bangin um’u hen.
Egypt gama kona nahung kitoldoh laiya banga Keiman thil kidang datmo umtah tah kavetsah ding ahi.
Namtin vaipin jong mudoh-uvin tin jahcha diu, Athahat’u kidang amudoh tengu leh jachatna anei diu ahi; Akhut’uva akamu akisip cheh diu, Anakol’uva jong kho ajah lou diu ahitai;

Gul banga leivui aleiya ale diu, Leiset’a a-op’a kithol ganhing banga um diu ahi; Akulpi dunguva kona kihot hot a hung potdoh diu, Kicha behseh jenguva Pakai i-Pathenu ahinbel diu ahi; Nangma jeh a amaho hi Abonchauva kicha soh hel diu ahi.

Nang banga agoulo amite ahingdoh amoh chengse dia Themmona ngaidama suh khelna subeisoh thei Pathen koipen um ding ham? Pathen chu alung hang jing jeng poi; Ajeh chu Pakai hi Lungset longlouva anei hi kipah jo ahibouve.
Aman eiho chunga voujang natna anei kit ding, Ithemmona chengseu jong akengto chotpha akoi ding ahi. Pakai nangin kachonset nau jouse Twikhanglen lilai thuh tah a nalelut soh ding ahi.
Jacob jong kitahna neitah a nabol’a Long louva Abraham nalungset ding; Masang laiya kapu kapateu koma nakihahsel banga Naboltei ding ahi.
